summary: Tested student_series feature for multi-grade classes. Backend APIs (5/5 tests passed): GET/POST/PUT correctly handle student_series in enrollments. CRITICAL Frontend bug found: 'Ano/Série' field missing from new student form.

ui_bugs.issue: CRITICAL: The 'Ano/Série' field is MISSING from the new student form. It only exists in the edit form. Lines 2829-2882 show grid-cols-4 with only Escola, Turma, and Status fields. The Ano/Série dropdown (data-testid='student-series-select') is not rendered for new students.
ui_bugs.fix_location: StudentsComplete.js lines 2829-2882 - Add Ano/Série field between Turma and Status

ui_bugs.component: StudentsComplete.js - New Student Form - Turma onChange
ui_bugs.issue: The Turma select onChange handler (line 2852) does NOT set student_series. It should: 1) For non-multi-grade: auto-set student_series to grade_level, 2) For multi-grade: clear student_series for user selection. Compare with editing form lines 2689-2698.
ui_bugs.selector: select (Turma field in new student form)

action_items: CRITICAL: Add 'Ano/Série' field to the new student form (lines 2829-2882). Copy the conditional logic from editing form (lines 2714-2745): show dropdown for multi-grade classes, readonly input for normal classes.
CRITICAL: Update grid from 'grid-cols-4' to 'grid-cols-5' at line 2829 to accommodate the new field.
CRITICAL: Update Turma onChange handler at line 2852 to set student_series: for non-multi-grade auto-set to grade_level, for multi-grade clear it for user selection.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend student_series implementation is CORRECT: GET returns from active enrollment, POST/PUT save to enrollment
Frontend editing form (lines 2667-2802) has correct implementation of Ano/Série field
Frontend new student form (lines 2804-2884) is MISSING the Ano/Série field entirely
The fix requires copying lines 2714-2745 (Ano/Série conditional render) into the new student form section
Also need to update onChange handler for Turma select to match the editing form behavior

success_rate.frontend: 50% - Edit form works, New form missing Ano/Série field

seed_data_creation: Test students created and cleaned up during backend tests (TEST_MULTI_SERIES_*, TEST_GET_SERIES_*, etc.)
